stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells and No. 1 Oklahoma Open Critical Georgia Series — Record Chase Enters Final Chapter

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 32 home runs. 🥎

5 away from tying Lauren Espinoza's all-time NCAA record (37, Arizona, 1995).

No. 1 Oklahoma opens a home series vs. No. 11 Georgia TODAY at Love's Field.

Every Wells at-bat is appointment softball.

#OUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
No. 1 OU (42-6, 15-3 SEC) vs. No. 11 Georgia — this weekend matters. 🥎

Win and the Sooners hold the No. 1 SEC Tournament seed.

Plus: Kendall Wells needs 5 more HRs to tie the all-time NCAA single-season record.

Love's Field is the place to be.

#OUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Needs 5 More HRs as No. 1 Oklahoma Opens Georgia Series — Record Chase Enters Final Chapter

stories.title: **Headline:** NiJaree Canady Receives AUSL Golden Ticket — First Player Selected in 2026 Draft

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady received the first AUSL Golden Ticket of 2026. 🥎

Commissioner Kim Ng walked onto the field at Rocky Johnson Field.

Then Canady threw Texas Tech to a 9-1 run-rule win over Iowa State.

The future of pro softball starts here.

#TexasTechSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Tech 45-4. Canady has the Golden Ticket. 🥎

She pitched 5 innings Thursday, allowed 2 hits, 1 run.

No. 2 Texas Tech is rolling into the final stretch of the season.

Between the AUSL draft and the WCWS, NiJaree Canady is everywhere right now.

#TexasTechSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: NiJaree Canady Receives AUSL Golden Ticket — First Player Chosen in 2026 Draft

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska's Doubleheader vs. Iowa Today — Huskers Chasing 14-Game Win Streak

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Nebraska (37-6, 17-1 Big Ten) plays a doubleheader vs Iowa TODAY. 🥎

First pitch: 3 PM CT. Game 2 starts 30 min after.

The Huskers are riding a 12-game win streak and gunning for 14.

National seed race. Big Ten title. Big day in Lincoln.

#HuskerSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Nebraska Plays Weather-Driven Doubleheader vs. Iowa — Huskers Riding 12-Game Win Streak

stories.title: **Headline:** No. 12 FSU Opens ACC Road Finale at Georgia Tech — Seminoles Close Regular Season

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
No. 12 FSU (40-7) travels to Georgia Tech tonight — final ACC road series. 🥎

Two days after Isa Torres hit TWO home runs to beat No. 5 Florida.

Game 1 on ACCNX at 6 PM ET.

Seminoles are locked in for the national seed stretch run.

#FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: No. 12 FSU Opens Final ACC Road Series at Georgia Tech — Seminoles' National Seed in Focus

stories.title: **Headline:** SEC Tournament Bracket Set — Oklahoma and Alabama Race for No. 1 Seed in Lexington

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
SEC Tournament is May 5-9 in Lexington. 🥎

Top 4 seeds get a double bye — that's a huge advantage in single-elimination.

Right now? Oklahoma and Alabama are TIED at 15-3 in the SEC.

Final three weekends decide who gets the No. 1 seed.

#SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: SEC Tournament Bracket Taking Shape — Oklahoma and Alabama Tied in No. 1 Seed Race

stories.title: **Headline:** WCWS Selection Show 16 Days Away — 32-Team Bracket, Regional Hosting at Stake

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
16 days until the WCWS selection show. 🥎

May 10 • 7 PM ET • ESPN2

32-team bracket. All top 16 seeds host regionals.

This weekend's results — OU-Georgia, Nebraska-Iowa, FSU-Georgia Tech — are shaping the bracket right now.

#WCWS #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Softball America Power 10 — Nebraska No. 2, Oklahoma Holds No. 1 Entering Final Weekends

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Nebraska is No. 2 in the Softball America Power 10 🥎 — the highest ranking in program history.

37-6. 17-1 Big Ten. Wins over Texas, LSU, Texas Tech, A&M, and South Carolina.

The Huskers are a legit national seed contender.

#HuskerSoftball #CollegeSoftball
